name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or agent workflow is blocked?

## Proposed behavior

What should `mdx-rust` do?

## Safety considerations

Does this touch candidate edits, validation, rollback, hooks, provenance, or public API?

## Alternatives

What simpler option would solve most of the problem?
